raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "summary": "External benchmarking task is valid and lawful. No Foundation Law violations. Speed itself is not a vulnerability — isolation and untested assumptions are. Current canon underweights operational resilience and third-party risk. 28-day achievement is exceptional by YC benchmarks; solo-founder execution at this pace relies on AI debt that could break validation chains. Sustainability hinges on rate-limiting AI delegation and hardening verification loops.", "key_sources": ["YC Startup School Milestones (2023)", "Techstars Founder Expectations Guide", "Paul Graham - Do Things That Don't Scale", "Sam Altman - The Post-Startup Startup", "Naval Ravikant - Speed and Iteration"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "No tracking of AI-generated dependency debt. Swarm autonomy lacks rate limits or response validation thresholds. CLI tool audit trail not anchored to git signed tags. Missing third-party risk register for AI services (Gemini, Groq, Cerebras).", "whistleblower_flag": null, "proposed_action": "Initiate external benchmark research via Perplexity as CTO-Brain. Concurrently run security audit on swarm input validation and CLI provenance. Add rate-limiting to all swarm API clients. Begin maintaining third-party risk register in memory/risks/. Flag any self-audit performed by same model instance that wrote the code."}
summary: External benchmarking task is valid and lawful. No Foundation Law violations. Speed itself is not a vulnerability — isolation and untested assumptions are. Current canon underweights operational resilience and third-party risk. 28-day achievement is exceptional by YC benchmarks; solo-founder execution at this pace relies on AI debt that could break validation chains. Sustainability hinges on rate-limiting AI delegation and hardening verification loops.
key_sources: Paul Graham - Do Things That Don't Scale
gaps_in_current_canon: No tracking of AI-generated dependency debt. Swarm autonomy lacks rate limits or response validation thresholds. CLI tool audit trail not anchored to git signed tags. Missing third-party risk register for AI services (Gemini, Groq, Cerebras).
proposed_action: Initiate external benchmark research via Perplexity as CTO-Brain. Concurrently run security audit on swarm input validation and CLI provenance. Add rate-limiting to all swarm API clients. Begin maintaining third-party risk register in memory/risks/. Flag any self-audit performed by same model instance that wrote the code.
